summary: Matrix recording with decent overall sound, but a badly received sax cameo detracts from an otherwise solid show.
review: The ultramatrix source captures the concert fairly well, though the guest saxophonist (Clarence Clemons) is mixed too prominently and described as “awful,” pulling down the listening experience. Aside from that, the reviewer feels the rest of the performance is good, but no specific songs are highlighted.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review rating the show 3 ★; comments praise most of the concert but criticize the sax mix, leading to an average overall assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear matrix recording, but the guest saxophone is mixed too loudly and described as unpleasant.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes the main set is solid; only the sax interlude is singled out as a negative element.
